title: AULE Metallic Pink Balloons: 50 Pcs 5 inch Small Chrome Hot Pink Party Balloons Shiny Baby Pink Tiny Latex Helium Thicken Balloon Birthday Baby Shower Gender Reveal Valentine's Day Wedding Decoration
features: NEW METALLIC BALLOONS - The pack of 50 pink metallic balloons with helium is perfect for all kinds of party or anniversary decorations. We have a wide range of color options and styles available for you to choose from, allowing you the freedom to mix and match as you please

HIGH-QUALITY PARTY BALLOONS - The 5-inch hot pink latex balloons are made of high-quality latex and are safe for use around children. Each of these pink birthday balloons weighs 1 grams and features a metallic surface that is brighter than ordinary latex balloons

BALLOONS CAN BE FILLED WITH - These pink helium balloons can be filled with air, helium, and water. The inflated state of the baby pink latex balloons can be maintained for at least 2 days. If filled with helium, the light pink chrome balloons can remain in a floating state for 8-12 hours. Unique design of bright pink eco-friendly balloons for the party

APPLICATIONS - The premium pink eco balloons are perfect party decorations, party accessories, party supplies, party essentials, party decor for Baby Shower, Gender Reveal, Mother's Day, Valentine's Day, Wedding and other party decorations in the new, fresh style
AFTER-SALES SERVICE - We are committed to providing the best service. If you have any problems during use, please contact us by email, we will try our best to address your issue
description: Product Description AULE Balloons The package of 50 metallised balloons with helium is perfect for any type of party or anniversary decoration. These balloons can be inflated with air, helium and water. The inflated condition of the yellow latex balloons can be maintained for at least 2 days. Why Choose Us: High-quality and safe party decorations. AULE Balloon has won the trust of thousands of satisfied customers. Our goal is to make every beautiful occasion a special day. The customer experience is our top priority. We have ten years of experience in designing decoration products and are committed to creating the most suitable decoration products for your parties, birthdays and events. Specifications Material: Natural latex Model: Metallic Balloons Colors: Available in 11 colours Gold / Green / Purple / Blue / Silver / Rose Gold / Lilac / Light Green / Black / Pink / Bordeaux Size: 30 cm / 13 cm (please confirm the product size before payment.) Packaging Included 50 x Metallic Balloons Product Presentation You can freely choose the products in our store and combine them as you like.
